$comment: DECLASSIFIED registry — single source of truth for every game, resource, and nav link. To add a game: add one entry to games[], then run tools/build-site.py. Do not hand-edit the generated regions in HTML.

site.name: DECLASSIFIED
site.author: Sean McKendry
site.tagline: Fact-check the record. The walk from headline to source, made playable.

games.title: The Outsider
games.blurb: Campaign emergence, birtherism, crowd size claims, personal attacks on judges. The foundational Phillips patterns.

games.title: The Transition
games.blurb: Post-election claims, inauguration attendance, early executive orders, media attacks. Institutional delegitimization escalates.

games.title: The Reckoning
games.blurb: January 6, the Big Lie, Mar-a-Lago, presidential immunity, and the 2024 campaign. Two new patterns: Victim Narrative and Preemptive Exoneration.

games.title: The Return
games.blurb: Second term claims, Schedule F, tariff misinformation, Benkler Calibration (assess societal impact independent of truth value).

games.title: The Crisis
games.blurb: Constitutional and institutional claims, judicial attacks, executive overreach. The most advanced claims. Includes Benkler Calibration.

games.title: Pro Se Litigation
games.blurb: Fact-check claims about federal civil rights litigation (McKendry v. PNC Bank). Advanced evidence assessment. No time limit.

resources.label: Glossary
resources.blurb: Every pattern, scale, and term — the Phillips Pattern Library and the Bogost Citation Scale, defined.
